title: Fur Coat
description: Upon pickup, mark [blue]7[/blue] random combats. Enemies in those rooms have [blue]1[/blue] HP.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Marks random combat rooms in the current act when obtained. At the start of combat in a marked room, all enemies are set to 1 HP. If new enemies are added to combat in a marked room, they also receive 1 HP.
